chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.S- 104 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For Non-prosecution 26-5-2025 None present for the petitioner; nor has any intimation been received. Record reflects that on 21-05-2025, counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, has filed statement for withdrawal of the instant petition. Accordingly, the same is allowed and the instant petition is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE Naveed Ali
